name: playground-stress-1k
description: Switch to the Stress 1k scenario (1000 nodes, ~1500 edges via random sparse generation). This is the d3-force-3d performance benchmark — the layout should complete and render without crashing or hanging.

setup.vlmDescription: Debug Playground overlay with 'Stress 1k' pill highlighted (no parameter controls — the stress scenarios are parameterless). The viewport shows a dense cloud of ~1000 small blue spherical nodes with ~1500 thin line edges forming an interconnected network. The cloud should be roughly spherical from the force solver's center-gravity term. Individual nodes are small but distinguishable; no rendering artifacts (no black screen, no exploding geometry, no single giant blob).
